channel.title: LaySun Blog - Commercial Artificial Plants & Trees
channel.description: Insights on artificial plants for commercial spaces — design trends, fire safety, material guides, and installation advice.

item.title: The Silk Myth: Why PE Artificial Plants Are Now the Commercial Standard
item.description: The silk era is over. PE artificial plants now dominate commercial specs — here's why polyethylene wins on UV resistance, fire safety, and total cost of ownership.

item.title: Commercial Artificial Plant Trends 2026: What Hotels, Offices, & Restaurants Are Asking For
item.description: Discover the top commercial artificial plant trends for 2026. From biophilic design integration to custom green walls, learn what hotels, offices, and restaurants are demanding this year.

item.title: Test Blog Post: LaySun Automation Workflow Verification
item.description: Testing the complete blog automation workflow from GitHub commits to Cloudflare deployment. Verifying image optimization standards, visual strategy, and cross-platform content distribution.

item.title: NFPE 701 Explained: What Hotel Designers Need to Know About Artificial Plant Fire Codes
item.description: If you're specifying artificial plants for a hotel or commercial property in the United States, NFPE 701 is non-negotiable. Here's what it means, how to verify compliance, and what questions to ask your supplier.

item.title: 5 Artificial Plant Trends Dominating Hotel Lobbies in 2025
item.description: From oversized statement palms to full-ceiling hanging installations, here are the artificial plant trends our hotel clients are requesting most this year.

item.title: Why Restaurants Are Installing Artificial Green Walls (And How to Get It Right)
item.description: Artificial green walls are transforming restaurant atmospheres while eliminating maintenance headaches. Learn the design considerations, fire safety requirements, and installation best practices.

item.title: PE vs PVC: Which Artificial Plant Material Lasts Longer Outdoors?
item.description: Understanding the difference between polyethylene (PE) and polyvinyl chloride (PCV) is crucial for outdoor artificial plants. We break down TV resistance, durability, and real-world performance.

item.title: Biophilic Design: How Artificial Plants Support Wellness in Commercial Spaces
item.description: Biophilic design connects people with nature to reduce stress and improve wellbeing. Discover how artificial plants can achieve these benefits without the maintenance challenges of live plants.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Outdoor Artificial Plant UV Ratings
item.description: Not all artificial plants are created equal for outdoor use. Learn how to interpret UV ratings, understand accelerated testing, and select plants that won't fade or deteriorate.

item.title: Specifying Artificial Plants: The Complete Procurement Checklist
item.description: From fire ratings to material specifications, this comprehensive checklist ensures you ask the right questions when procuring artificial plants for commercial projects.

item.title: Jojo's Riverside Rooftop: Transforming Outdoor Dining with Artificial Greenery
item.description: Case study: How Joju's Riverside transformed their rooftop dining experience with custom artificial olive trees and green walls that withstand weather while maintaining elegance.
